creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
amdmi3      2009-01-13 02:21:28 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/jawstats         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/jawstats/files   pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  JAWStats is a free site statistics and analytics package.
  It runs in conjunction with AWStats and produces clear and informative charts,
  graphs and tables about your website visitors.
  
  WWW: http://www.jawstats.com
  
  PR:             130352
  Submitted by:   Alan Snelson <Alan at Wave2 dot co dot uk>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2233    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile

  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/jawstats/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/jawstats/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/jawstats/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +362 -0    ports/www/jawstats/pkg-plist (new)
